content:
🟡 Cybersecurity company Trellix suffered breach enabling unauthorized access to a portion of its source code.
CVE: 
Target: Trellix source code
According to The Hacker News. #GitLeaks #SourceCodeBreach

🟠 A local privilege escalation flaw (CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS: 7.8/10)) in various Linux distributions allows attackers to gain Linux root access.
CVE: CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS: 7.8/10)
Target: Various Linux distributions
According to The Hacker News. #LinuxLPE #CVEupdate

🟡 Researchers discovered a large-scale scam using Telegram Mini Apps for crypto scams & Android malware distribution.
CVE: None listed
Actor: Not specified
Target: Telegram Mini Apps/Android
According to BleepingComputer. #TelegramMiniApps #AndroidMalware

🟡 Microsoft Defender is detecting legitimate DigiCert root certificates as malware, causing false positives and potential certificate removal.
CVE: None
Actor: None
According to BleepingComputer. #DigiCert #WindowsCert

🟡 ShinyHunters claims a successful data breach against Instructure, allegedly stealing user data. 
According to BleepingComputer. #ShinyHunters #DataBreach

🟡 A global crackdown has led to the arrest of 276 suspects, shutting down 9 cryptocurrency scam centers and seizing $701M from investment fraud schemes targeting Americans. 
According to The Hacker News. #CryptoScam #FinancialFraud

🟢 Data centers are becoming critical infrastructure targets as AI drives dependence on cloud infrastructure.
CVE: 
Target: 
According to CyberScoop. #CloudSecurity #AIInfrastructure
